stories.title_zh: 字节探索自动驾驶，Seed世界模型团队负责｜36氪独家
stories.title_en: 字节探索自动驾驶，Seed世界模型团队负责｜36氪独家
stories.desc_zh: 36氪从多位产业人士处获悉，字节跳动正探索进入自动驾驶领域。这一项目目前由Seed旗下周畅的世界模型团队负责。据了解，Seed旗下不仅有周畅的多模态模型、世界模型等团队，还有大语言模型方向。 而自动驾驶与世界模型的技术路线有交叠之处。 另有消息人士告诉36氪，业务方向上，字节有意布局的自动驾驶场景有无人物流，这一业务隶属于字节旗下的火山引擎汽车行业线。 部分接近字节的知情人士表示，字节团队此前与一些头部自动驾驶团队进行过业务探讨交流，目前字节的自动驾驶项目已进入早期筹备状态。字节向不少头部辅助驾驶或自动驾驶人才发出了邀约，一些看好字节这一布局的技术人才也计划加入。 针对以上消息，36氪向字节求证，字节回应：“字节在AI大模型前沿探索领域，包括物理AI领域，有很多早期研究和探索，但并没有做智能驾驶业务的计划。” Seed是字节旗下的大模型基础研究团队，成立于2023年，是字节的一级战略级部门

stories.desc_zh: 文丨小葵 编辑丨果脯 7月9日，网易旗下Joker工作室端出了他们打磨了七年的作品——《遗忘之海》，一款海洋奇遇大世界RPG。PC端率先公测，移动端版本将在7月23日与玩家见面。 这款怪诞木偶风的航海游戏，还没出海就已经被盯上了。在公测前夕，这款游戏全网预约量已突破3600万，在TapTap、B站等多个平台预约榜冲至Top1。实机PV在B站播放破千万，光大证券预测其首年流水或达50亿元。 管理层连续三个季度在财报会上点名力挺，称其“令人耳目一新”。七年打磨、三端互通、五千万元创作者扶持计划，从研发资源到生态投入全部拉满这款游戏几乎是网易近年来押注最狠的一款产品。 这是做出《第五人格》的团队头一回涉足大世界，美术风格延续了工作室一贯的怪诞路线。在如今国产游戏不是拼命卷写实就是扎堆唯美二次元的大潮里，Joker选择用明亮、高饱和度色彩搭起一个由木偶造型和波普艺术缝合的海洋大世界。 捏脸系统 对

stories.title_zh: 一场高转化抽奖活动应该怎么设计？从奖品、规则到传播路径的完整拆解
stories.title_en: How should a High Conversion Sweepstakes be designed? Complete disassembly from prizes, rules to paths of dissemination
stories.desc_zh: 在微信私域生态中，抽奖几乎是商家长期使用的互动玩法：公众号涨粉、社群促活、线下门店引流、会员权益发放、品牌活动传播，都能看到它的身影。它的优势很直接：用户理解门槛低、参与反馈快、成本相对可控，也容易和微信内的公众号、社群、小程序、门店场景结合。 但也正因为抽奖看起来简单，很多活动最后只做成了“一次热闹”。参与人数有了，目标用户没沉淀；奖品发出去了，后续转化没接住；前端页面很热闹，后端领奖、核销、数据复盘却跟不上。 所以，一场高转化抽奖活动的关键，不在于能不能完成基础开奖，而在于奖品设置、参与条件、玩法形式、传播路径、中奖规则、领奖履约能否形成完整闭环。 对企业商家来说，抽奖不是目的。真正重要的是：用户为什么愿意参与，参与后能不能被有效承接，活动结束后数据和用户关系能不能继续沉淀。 下面，我们就结合「活动抽奖」小程序工具的实际能力，从目标设定、奖品组合、参与条件、玩法设计、传播路径到领奖履约
stories.desc_en: In the WeChat private domain ecology, lottery is almost an interactive game method used by merchants for a long time: the public account is popular, the community is promoted, offline stores are drained, members' rights are distributed, and brand activities are disseminated. stories.title_en: Clinique Bets on PDRN Skincare Track, High-end Beauty Brands Accelerate Access to the Medical Beauty Care Market | Frontline
stories.desc_zh: 随着医美消费逐渐从单次项目体验转向长期肌肤管理，传统高端护肤品牌正在寻找新的增长空间。 36氪获悉，近日，雅诗兰黛集团旗下品牌倩碧在中国发布CX肌源深修水光系列产品，切入近年来快速升温的PDRN（聚脱氧核糖核苷酸）护肤赛道。 该系列以重组PDRN为核心成分。据雅诗兰黛集团介绍，这是全球首款以重组PDRN为核心成分的护肤产品。此次新品发布，也是倩碧近年来持续强化“科学护肤”和医美护理关联度的重要动作。 PDRN并非近年才出现的新成分。过去十多年，其更多应用于医疗和医美领域。PDRN最早源于三文鱼DNA提取物，被认为具有促进组织修复、改善皮肤屏障以及辅助伤口恢复等作用。在韩国医美市场，PDRN注射类项目近年来持续流行，并被消费者称为“童颜针”相关护理成分之一。 图片来源：倩碧 随着消费者对医美项目接受度提升，围绕术前维稳、术后修护以及长期抗老的“医美后护理”市场正在扩大。根据市场研究机构Gra

stories.title_zh: lululemon「割不动」中国人了
stories.title_en: lululemon「割不动」中国人了
stories.desc_zh: 作者 | 谢芸子 编辑 | 张帆 在中国市场，lululemon开始被人们拿着放大镜审视。 6月中旬，lululemon在上海北外滩举办了一场大型户外瑜伽活动，中途遭遇暴雨。lululemon并未取消活动，而是让上千人在湿滑的瑜伽垫上完成了全套动作。 现场画面被社交网络疯传。整齐划一的雨中静坐，被人们诟病为“矫揉造作”“品牌不为用户着想”，甚至被部分网友拿来与《周处除三害》中的邪教作对比。 这一比喻的杀伤力是巨大的，lululemon最核心的商业密码恰恰是“类宗教”式的社群营销。 公共叙事中，lululemon把自己的店员称为Educator教育家。 创始人Chip Wilson在自传中解释过原因。他希望门店员工不是推销员，而是向顾客传递面料科技、哲学设计和健康生活方式的教育者。他认为，顾客理解了产品背后的技术与理念，会自发购买，无需硬性推销。 店员成为教育家，线下活动自然能比喻

stories.desc_zh: 作者｜黄楠 编辑｜袁斯来 硬氪获悉，威联机器人科技（深圳）有限公司（以下简称“MOVA LINCO”）近日完成数千万元天使融资。融资资金将主要用于AI算法底层技术研发、完善产品量产体系，以及全球化渠道布局和家庭AI生态的持续建设。 MOVA LINCO核心团队来自头部网络通信与智能硬件企业，在路由器、NAS存储及AI算力设备等方面拥有深厚的技术积累与产品经验。公司产品矩阵以AI智能语音路由器、AI NAS及AI算力盒子三大品类为核心，构建“连接+存储+算力”三位一体的家庭AI基础设施架构，覆盖从智能家居中枢、数据存储及本地算力分配等全场景需求，专注为全球用户提供智能化、主动化的家庭AI服务体验。 长期以来，路由器的定位颇为特殊。它在数字基础设施中承担着连接枢纽的关键职能，但又极少进入用户的日常感知。购置产品后，除短暂的配置环节外，这台设备常被隐藏在弱电箱或电视柜交流，极少能获取到用户的主动

This round of financing is the third round of financing completed by the company within three months, led by Yuanhe Puhua, followed by Futeng Capital and Houxue Capital. The funds will mainly be used for the mass production and stocking of the first consumer-grade product, market expansion, team expansion, and the research and development of the next generation of intelligent flapping wing robots and fluid simulation engines. Founded in Shenzhen in March 2025, EagleWing is one of the first companies in the world to focus on smart flapping wing robots. The founder, Chen Hao, is a mechanical engineering student at Shanghai Jiaotong University, and the team R&D personnel account for more than 75%. At present, the core members are from universities and technology companies such as Shanghai Jiaotong University, Dajiang, Huawei, and Byte. They have both cutting-edge scientific research, global market, and Internet operation experience, and continue to promote the industrialization of fluid intelligence technology. Hard Krypton understands that the essential difference between flapping-wing flying and rotary-wing drones is how the fluid is handled. stories.desc_zh: 徕芬珠海超级工厂（图源/企业） 作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来 7月8日，徕芬科技在珠海斗门的超级工厂举办媒体探访活动。 这座总投资超5亿元、占地超20万平方米的制造基地，自2025年8月投产以来，首次较大规模地向外界开放参观。 该工厂目前承接电动牙刷、剃须刀及部分新品的生产，并配套了电机车间、精密成型车间、喷涂车间、组装车间及约3000平方米的可靠性实验室。 徕芬可靠性实验室（图源/企业） 自建工厂在消费电子行业并非主流路径，尤其对于一家成立仅7年的公司而言，重资产投入意味着更长的回报周期和更大的经营压力。 硬氪了解到，徕芬选择自建工厂，部分原因在于外部代工厂不愿承接其高成本、高规格的订单——这意味着如果依赖代工，某些设计方案根本无法落地。因此，徕芬坚持核心零部件自研自产。 目前，徕芬已自研并量产高速三相无刷电机、伺服电机、高速直线电机、轴向磁通电机四类技术，覆盖所有产品线。 徕芬珠海超级工厂
stories.desc_en: Leifen Zhuhai Super Factory (Photo Source/Enterprise) Author Ou Xue Editor Yuan Shilai On July 8, Leifen Technology held a media visit at the Zhuhai Doumen Super Factory. This manufacturing base with a total investment of more than 500 million yuan and an area of more than 200,000 square meters has opened to the outside world on a large scale for the first time since it was put into operation in August 2025. The factory is currently engaged in the production of electric toothbrushes, razors and some new products, and is equipped with a motor workshop, a precision molding workshop, a spraying workshop, an assembly workshop and a reliability laboratory of about 3,000 square meters. Leifen Reliability Labs (image source/enterprise) Self-built factories are not the mainstream path in the consumer electronics industry, especially for a company that has only been established for 7 years, heavy asset investment means longer return cycles and greater operating pressure. Hard Krypton learned that Leifen chose to build its own factory in part because of the reluctance of outside foundries to take on its high-cost, high-specification orders - meaning that some designs simply couldn't land if they relied on foundries. Therefore, Leifen insists on self-development and self-production of core components. At present, Leifen has developed and mass-produced four types of technologies for high-speed three-phase brushless motors, servo motors, high-speed linear motors, and axial flux motors, covering all product lines. The tide is fading, the demand for new and good drugs is still there, and entrepreneurs are living through scientific, clinical, and commercialization in a more stringent valuation coordinate system. In the field of cell and gene therapy (CGT) in China, the name “Fan Xiaohu” is difficult to bypass. stories.title_zh: Meta紧急下线争议AI生图功能
stories.title_en: Meta紧急下线争议AI生图功能
stories.desc_zh: 社交媒体巨头Meta本周推出一项允许用户通过@提及公开Instagram账号、利用他人公开内容生成AI图像的新功能。该功能上线时默认允许公开内容被引用，引发美国演员工会等机构对肖像权侵犯以及犯罪风险的强烈担忧。Meta表示，相关功能“未能达到预期效果”，因此决定全面下线。（财联社）
stories.desc_en: Social media giant Meta this week introduced a new feature that allows users to @ mention public Instagram accounts and use other people's public content to generate AI images. By default, public content is allowed to be cited when the feature is launched, raising strong concerns about portrait rights violations and crime risks from organizations such as the American Screen Actors Union. Meta said the feature was “not working as expected” and decided to go fully offline. (Finance Association)

stories.title_zh: 小米回应网传澎程价格
stories.title_en: 小米回应网传澎程价格
stories.desc_zh: 36氪获悉，日前，小米汽车正式公布全新系列“小米澎程”，定位智能可变大空间SUV，计划推出五座版和七座版车型，同时也是小米汽车首个增程式SUV系列。在最新一期答网友问中，小米汽车回应了外界关注的新车发布时间。官方表示，目前小米澎程的发布及上市工作正在有序推进，近期将公布发布时间等最新进展。针对网络流传的新车价格，小米汽车表示，部分价格预测显著低于基本成本常识，大家希望新车拥有“美好价格”的心情可以理解，但价格推测仍需尊重科学和市场规律。
stories.desc_en: 36 Krypton learned that recently, Xiaomi Automobile officially announced a new series of "Xiaomi Pengcheng", positioning intelligent variable space SUV, plans to launch five-seater and seven-seater models, and is also the first extended range SUV series of Xiaomi Automobile. In the latest issue of Answers to Netizens' Questions, Xiaomi Motor responded to the new car release time that was concerned by the outside world. The official said that the release and listing of Xiaomi Pengcheng is currently proceeding in an orderly manner, and the latest progress such as the release time will be announced in the near future. In response to the price of new cars circulating on the Internet, Xiaomi said that some price forecasts are significantly lower than the basic cost common sense. It is understandable that everyone hopes that new cars will have a "good price", but price speculation still needs to respect science and market laws.

stories.title_zh: 年内退出134家，村镇银行改革持续加速
stories.title_en: 年内退出134家，村镇银行改革持续加速
stories.desc_zh: 2026年以来，国内村镇银行重组整合进程持续提速。统计显示，截至7月9日，今年已有134家村镇银行获批退出，机构总量缩减至1048家，延续2025年以来加快出清的态势。业内人士认为，县域金融生态正迎来重塑，精简村镇银行数量，将推动县域金融服务提质增效。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Since 2026, the restructuring and integration process of domestic village banks has continued to accelerate. Statistics show that as of July 9, 134 rural banks have been approved to withdraw this year, reducing the total number of institutions to 1,048, continuing the trend of accelerating clearance since 2025. Insiders believe that the county financial ecology is being reshaped and the number of village banks will be streamlined, which will promote the quality and efficiency of county financial services. (Securities Times)

stories.title_zh: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.title_en: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash

stories.title_zh: 市场发行热度大幅升温，熊猫债存量规模首超5000亿元
stories.title_en: 市场发行热度大幅升温，熊猫债存量规模首超5000亿元
stories.desc_zh: 今年以来，熊猫债发行热度显著上升。Wind数据显示，截至7月9日，以缴款截止日为统计口径，年内熊猫债发行规模已突破1700亿元，同比增长超七成；市场存量规模首次迈上5000亿元。与此同时，熊猫债发行主体结构持续优化，境外主权机构、跨国龙头企业、多边开发机构纷纷入场，为市场发展注入新动能。受访业内人士表示，熊猫债市场发行火热，主要受益于中美利差倒挂、人民币融资成本优势突出、人民币汇率趋稳等因素。熊猫债市场规模稳步扩张，将有助于推动人民币从贸易结算货币向国际投融资货币转型，持续提升人民币在全球资本市场的话语权，也是我国推进金融高水平对外开放的成果。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Since the beginning of this year, the heat of issuing panda bonds has increased significantly. Wind data shows that as of July 9, with the payment deadline as the statistical caliber, the issuance scale of panda bonds has exceeded 170 billion yuan in the year, an increase of more than 70% year-on-year; the market stock has reached 500 billion yuan for the first time. At the same time, the structure of the issuing entity of panda bonds continued to be optimized, and overseas sovereign institutions, multinational leading enterprises, and multilateral development institutions have entered the market to inject new momentum into market development. According to the interviewed industry insiders, the hot issue in the panda bond market was mainly due to factors such as the inverted spread between China and the United States, the prominent advantage of RMB financing costs, and the stabilization of the RMB exchange rate. The steady expansion of the size of the panda bond market will help promote the transformation of the RMB from a trade settlement currency to an international investment and financing currency, and continue to enhance the RMB's voice in the global capital market. It is also the result of China's promotion of high-level financial opening up. (Securities Times)

stories.title_zh: SK海力士考虑“内存即服务”模式，或允许客户租赁而非购买芯片
stories.title_en: SK海力士考虑“内存即服务”模式，或允许客户租赁而非购买芯片
stories.desc_zh: SK海力士正在考虑以新的方式销售其内存芯片的使用权，包括所谓的“内存即服务”，这意味着客户可以向这家韩国公司租用存储资源，而无需购买芯片。“我们实际上可以提供其他商业模式，”SK集团会长崔泰源在接受彭博电视采访时表示。“我们可以成为存储服务提供商，提供‘内存即服务’。未来，这实际上是我们可以关注的另一个领域。”（财联社）
stories.desc_en: SK Hynix is considering new ways to sell the use of its memory chips, including so-called “memory-as-a-service,” which means customers can lease storage resources from the South Korean company without having to buy the chips. “We can actually offer other business models,” Cui Taiyuan, chairman of SK Group, said in an interview with Bloomberg Television. “We can be a storage service provider, offering ‘memory as a service’. In the future, this is actually another area that we can focus on." (Finance Association)

stories.desc_zh: 据报道，在OpenAI重组之际，该公司安全系统负责人Johannes Heidecke本周告知员工其将离职。此次重组旨在整合OpenAI的安全团队和研究团队。备忘录显示，OpenAI首席研究官Mark Chen表示，安全团队将向公司研究副总裁兼整合负责人Mia Glaese汇报工作，后者将兼任研究与安全副总裁。此前领导 OpenAI安全团队的Saachi Jain将成为公司临时安全系统负责人，向Glaese汇报工作。（界面）
stories.desc_en: Johannes Heidecke, the company's head of security systems, reportedly informed employees this week of his departure amid the restructuring of OpenAI. The reorganization aims to integrate OpenAI's security and research teams. Mark Chen, OpenAI's chief research officer, said the security team will report to Mia Glaese, the company's vice president of research and head of integration, who will also serve as vice president of research and security, according to the memo. Saachi Jain, who previously led the OpenAI security team, will become the head of the company's temporary security system, reporting to Glaese. (Interface)

stories.desc_full_zh: 5.14，英特尔、AMD、火山引擎、沐曦、壁仞等关键玩家已就位，2026智算基础设施创新大会暨萧山区芯机社区产业生态共建交流会杭州启幕！

stories.title_zh: 【评论】适应从造城到更新的转变，构建城市可持续发展新范式
stories.title_en: 【评论】适应从造城到更新的转变，构建城市可持续发展新范式

stories.title_zh: OpenAI表示，在分手喋喋不休的情况下， GPT 5.6是Microsoft Copilot 365的“首选型号”
stories.title_en: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
stories.desc_zh: OpenAI的新系列模型将继续为微软的工作场所和生产力应用程序套件提供支持。
stories.desc_en: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

stories.title_zh: Fidji Simo退出OpenAI的2号角色
stories.title_en: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
stories.desc_zh: OpenAI的二号高管菲吉·西莫（ Fidji Simo ）在病假时间超过预期后辞去了她的全职职务，这是一个领导层的真空，这是一个棘手的时刻，因为该公司正在寻找可能的首次公开募股机会，并竞相在企业市场上抓住Anthropic。
stories.desc_en: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

stories.title_zh: OpenAI推出带有GPT-5.6的新型号系列
stories.title_en: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
stories.desc_zh: OpenAI最新的模型系列承诺在包括网络安全在内的一系列领域进行改进。
stories.desc_en: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

stories.title_zh: 一家人工智能经纪人初创公司刚刚让其经纪人完成了1亿美元的$筹款
stories.title_en: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
stories.desc_zh: Lyzr是一家为企业构建人工智能代理的初创公司，它使用自己的人工智能代理筹集了1亿美元的资金--这显然证明了该产品确实有效。
stories.desc_en: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

stories.title_zh: OpenAI正在关闭Atlas ，但其人工智能浏览器的野心仍在增长
stories.title_en: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
stories.desc_zh: 在不到一年的时间里， OpenAI即将推出其基于AI的浏览器。但它正在将一些代理浏览功能转移到其桌面应用程序和Chrome扩展程序中。
stories.desc_en: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

stories.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）称赞神话/寓言，承诺不会“切断”人类
stories.title_en: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
stories.desc_zh: Anthropic是否应该信任埃隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）来托管其车型？马斯克坚持认为，公司的收入约为400亿美元。
stories.desc_en: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

stories.title_zh: 人工智能能回答$ 3万亿的问题吗？
stories.title_en: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
stories.desc_zh: 人工智能投资回报率（ ROI ）的争论已经卷土重来，数字甚至更大，或许后果也是如此。
stories.desc_en: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.

stories.title_zh: Meta通过Muse Spark 1.1进入拥挤的人工智能编码大战
stories.title_en: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
stories.desc_zh: Meta对用户的推销是Spark处理大型代理工作负载、修复错误和帮助进行大型代码迁移的能力--企业越来越多地转向人工智能公司提供的那种自动化。
stories.desc_en: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.

stories.title_zh: 《纽约时报》称OpenAI在ChatGPT版权审判中隐藏证据
stories.title_en: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
stories.desc_zh: 新闻发布商表示， OpenAI隐藏了可以在ChatGPT输出中识别版权新闻的工具和数据集，并通过新的制裁动议升级了他们的诉讼。
stories.desc_en: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

stories.title_zh: 谷歌现在将披露哪些广告是用人工智能制作的
stories.title_en: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
stories.desc_zh: 虽然谷歌禁止误导性和欺骗性广告，但广告仍然可以利用人工智能来创建某种类型的合成或数字篡改内容。到目前为止，谷歌只需要在选举广告中披露这一点。
stories.desc_en: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose.

stories.title_zh: 总部位于巴黎的人工智能语音初创公司Gradium在英伟达的支持下筹集了1亿美元的种子资金
stories.title_en: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
stories.desc_zh: 该公司正在利用这笔资金在旧金山湾区开设办事处，并在那里竞争人才， “巩固其在世界领先的人工智能生态系统中心的地位”。
stories.desc_en: The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."

stories.title_zh: 政府如何确定OpenAI的前沿模型是否可以安全发布？
stories.title_en: How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
stories.desc_zh: “政府与Anthropic和OpenAI之间的对话到底是什么样子尚不清楚。”
stories.desc_en: "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."

stories.title_zh: Instagram用户：以下是如何阻止Meta的人工智能使用您的照片
stories.title_en: Instagram users: Here’s how to stop Meta’s AI from using your photos
stories.desc_zh: Muse Image允许用户使用来自公共Instagram帐户的照片生成AI图像。只要一个人的个人资料是公开的，另一个用户就可以标记该帐户，并将其图像用作人工智能生成的创作的一部分。
stories.desc_en: Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts. As long as a person's profile is public, another user can tag that account and use their images as part of an AI-generated creation.

stories.title_zh: Meta的新AI芯片将于9月开始生产
stories.title_en: Meta’s new AI chips will begin production in September
stories.desc_zh: 该公司正在采用模块化方法来设计这些芯片，预计随着芯片投入生产时AI的快速发展，它们的需求将发生变化。
stories.desc_en: The company is taking a modular approach to designing these chips, anticipating that their needs will change as AI evolves rapidly by the time the chips are in production.

stories.title_zh: 英伟达是其创建的计算市场的受害者
stories.title_en: Nvidia is a victim of the compute marketplace it created
stories.desc_zh: 在证明了计算的价值之后，该公司发现自己处于每个人都想进入的市场的中心—而更简单的技术和不太有趣的公司则在场外致富。
stories.desc_en: Having proven how valuable compute can be, the company finds itself at the center of a market everyone wants to be in — while simpler technologies and less interesting companies get rich on the sidelines.

stories.title_zh: 2026·Under36丨绕过旧答案的一代人
stories.title_en: 2026·Under36丨绕过旧答案的一代人
stories.desc_zh: 为什么颠覆性的突破总是由年轻人完成？ 因为他们还没有被旧范式驯服。 几乎所有开创一种新范式、完成根本性发明的人，都有某种相似之处：他们要么足够年轻，要么刚刚进入那个即将被他们改写的领域。 1962年，科学哲学家托马斯·库恩在《科学革命的结构》中留下了这个观察。他当时谈论的是物理科学：哥白尼提出日心说时不到四十岁，牛顿发明微积分时二十三岁，爱因斯坦发表狭义相对论时二十六岁。 而库恩试图回答的问题是，为什么颠覆性的突破总是由年轻人完成？答案是简单而残酷的，因为他们还没有被旧范式驯服。 在整理完2026年度Under 36入选者的资料之后，我们很难不想起这个判断：新的范式不靠说服旧的人，而是靠一代新人改写。 无法否认的是，商业叙事的聚光灯，从那些“看到缝隙的人”转向了“掌握技术的人”。 曾经的商业武器是直觉、速度和对用户痛点的嗅觉。他们依旧有效，但另一套创业语法已经覆盖上来。现在，越来越多人带着
stories.desc_en: Why are disruptive breakthroughs always done by young people? Because they haven't been tamed by the old paradigm. Almost everyone who pioneered a new paradigm and accomplished a fundamental invention bears some resemblance: they were either young enough or had just entered a field that was about to be rewritten by them. In 1962, the philosopher of science Thomas Kuhn left this observation in The

stories.title_zh: 创始人回归，一家高增长公司进入新阶段
stories.title_en: 创始人回归，一家高增长公司进入新阶段
stories.desc_zh: 六月末的苏黎世，利马特河从 On Labs 楼后流过。昂跑（On）三位创始人之一 Olivier Bernhard 站在一群跑步与商业记者面前，先说了一句略带歉意的开场白：“这里不是那种光鲜亮丽的展示空间。” 他提醒来客，接下来会看到戴着护目镜的工程师、指尖沾着蓝色染料的设计师，以及在跑步机上大汗淋漓、把自己逼到极限的运动员。这是昂跑第一次向外部媒体掀开其创新引擎的帷幕——On Labs 平日紧闭的那道门。 选择此刻开门，并非偶然。这家 2010 年诞生于瑞士、由前铁人三项运动员 Olivier Bernhard 与 David Allemann、Caspar Coppetti 共同创立的公司，正站在一个微妙的节点上。 就在一个多月前，公司刚刚完成一次重要的人事调整。联合创始人 David Allemann 与Caspar Coppetti 接替担任五年 CEO 的Martin Hoffm

stories.title_zh: 揭秘Momenta：马斯克式CEO、AI执念和量产机器丨深氪
stories.title_en: Secret Momenta: Musk CEO, AI Inspiration and Mass Production Machine Deep Krypton
stories.desc_zh: 特斯拉FSD（Full Self-Driving）每迭代出一个新版本，自动驾驶公司Momenta的创始人曹旭东都会飞去美国亲自体验。 “他还不光是去坐车，还会找一切能接触到特斯拉的人聊。”接触到曹旭东的人士告诉36氪，马斯克是曹旭东最常提到的人。 在内部，许多员工对曹旭东的一个共同感受，就是“马斯克式CEO”。 创业十年，Momenta赴港股IPO，上市首日（7月8日）市值达700亿港元。Momenta创始人曹旭东对36氪用两个数据，概括Momenta的阶段性成绩：定点车型市占率超50%，量产搭载车辆市占率超60%。 在这个节点回望，多位在职或者离职人士都向36氪总结，Momenta的内核和这家公司的经营底色，几乎都指向曹旭东，这位掌舵者的目标感和决策力。 Momenta如今在辅助驾驶量产市占率上大幅度领跑，业界往往认为跟两件事有关。 第一，是在其他自动驾驶公司都押宝L4方向时，曹旭东选择
stories.desc_en: With each iteration of Tesla FSD (Full Self-Driving), Cao Xudong, founder of self-driving company Momenta, flies to the United States to experience it for himself. “He's not just going for a ride, he's going to talk to everyone who has access to Tesla. People who contacted Cao Xudong told 36 Krypton that Musk was the person Cao Xudong mentioned most often. Internally, many employees have a common

stories.title_zh: 中国鱼子酱，占领头等舱
stories.title_en: 中国鱼子酱，占领头等舱
stories.desc_zh: 作者 | 谢芸子 编辑 | 张帆 2026年6月30日，杭州千岛湖鲟龙科技正式在港交所上市。虽然挂着“科技”的名头，这家公司却在“养鱼”，也是名副其实的“全球最大鱼子酱企业”。 资本市场给到这个传统赛道热烈的回应。 上市当日，鲟龙科技开盘报价103港元，较发行价75.5港元上涨36.42%，总市值约112.15亿港元。截至收盘，股价进一步攀升至114港元，涨幅达到50.99%。 而在此前的公开发售阶段，这家公司更是获得了2134.81倍的超额认购。贝莱德、霸菱、泰康人寿、景林等8家基石投资者的合计认购约6.15亿港元，占发售股份近50%。从数据上看，这是一场堪称完美的IPO。 问题在于，一家年营收不足8亿元的“养鱼公司”，凭什么如此受市场追捧？鲟龙科技真的让中国人实现“鱼子酱自由”了吗？水面之下，又藏着多少看不见的暗礁？ “黑金”生意的中国剧本 鱼子酱是一种经过腌制的鱼卵佐餐食品
